title: amphinomia steingroeveriana
intro: Amphinomia steingroeveriana, also known as African cucumber or West African cucumber, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cucurbitaceae. The plant is traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, to be used for its medicinal and health benefits.
